exemplar.title: Does some knowledge belong only to particular communities of knowers?

detailedExemplarData.title: Does some knowledge belong only to particular communities of knowers?

strengths: Clearly identifies three distinct real-world objects and situates each within recognizable social or historical contexts.
Consistently links each objectâs specialised knowledge to the IA prompt about knowledge restricted to particular communities.
Uses concrete evidence and appropriate citations (quotes, historical references, game terminology) to support explanations.
Maintains focus on the TOK prompt with minimal repetition and a clear framing of the investigation.
weaknesses: Commentary occasionally remains descriptive rather than analytical, limiting depth of insight into knowledge restriction.
Inconsistent citation formatting and redundant footnotes detract from scholarly presentation.
Lacks an overarching thesis statement and definition of key terms (e.g., âcommunity of knowersâ) in the introduction.
Conclusion restates choices without synthesising key insights across all three objects.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs exhibition aligns with the 7â8 band: it names three specific objects, situates them in real contexts, and makes clear, well-supported links to the prompt about specialised community knowledge. Strengths include concrete examples, explicit references, and strong justifications for object inclusion. However, occasional over-description, uneven analytic depth, formatting inconsistencies, and a lack of synthesis in the conclusion prevent the work from reaching the top band (9â10). Overall quality warrants a score at the upper end of the 7â8 range, therefore an 8 is justified.

annotations.comment: The student clearly states the TOK prompt and exhibition title, effectively framing the investigation around how knowledge belongs to particular communities.
The introduction would benefit from a concise thesis statement summarizing the three chosen objects and their collective insight into restricted knowledge.
Defining key terms such as âcommunity of knowersâ early would strengthen clarity and align the audienceâs understanding with the prompt.
Object 1 is clearly labeled as âHilo murrâ, providing immediate orientation and focus for the discussion of this cultural artifact.
The image of the drink and its preparation successfully anchors the reader in a specific cultural context, reinforcing the real-world nature of the object.
The description of preparation is rich in detail but remains largely descriptiveâconsider integrating analysis of how specialized skills restrict knowledge to the Sudanese community.
The quoted local testimony effectively illustrates shared communal knowledge and justifies the objectâs inclusion under the chosen prompt.
The repeating footnote URL on pages 2â3 suggests consolidation into a single reference list to improve citation clarity and avoid redundancy.
The concluding sentence ties the drink back to the prompt, but could be strengthened by explicitly highlighting implications for knowledge transmission.
A stray inline math element appears here (`\overline{a}`) without contextâensure only relevant analytic notation is included.
Object 2 is clearly titled and immediately signals a shift to a distinct cultural artifact with relevant social significance.
The protest photograph provides powerful visual evidence of how the toub embodies collective political knowledge in Sudanese womenâs activism.
The narrative on Alaa Salahâs use of the toub is vivid, but analysis could be deeper by linking how symbolic clothing translates into shared societal knowledge.
When making historical claims about the Kandakas, include a citation to strengthen credibility and demonstrate research rigor.
The image caption should adhere to academic formatting (e.g., author, date) to maintain consistent scholarly conventions.
Historical context about the toubâs evolution offers a strong foundation; the student effectively situates the object within Sudanese cultural continuity.
The inference that all Sudanese women share this symbolism is broad; consider qualifying or providing evidence of diverse interpretations within the community.
The student explicitly ties the toub back to the prompt, clarifying that political and historical knowledge is restricted to those aware of its legacy.
Expand on how a non-Sudanese observer might misinterpret the garment, illustrating the limits of uncontextualized knowledge.
Object 3âs title immediately flags a modern case of communal knowledge, demonstrating relevance to current global contexts.
The screenshot from the app store provides concrete evidence of the gameâs community and real-world impact.
The game mechanics are described accurately, but analysis should focus more on how gameplay rules create proprietary knowledge within the gamer community.
Identifying the term âsusâ underscores specialized jargon, aptly demonstrating terminology as a form of restricted knowledge.
The citation in the footnote is irregular; standardize referencing style and ensure URL and date formatting are consistent.
The conclusion restates object choices but lacks synthesisâconsider summarizing key insights about restricted knowledge across all three objects.
A comparative reflection on how each object uniquely contributes to understanding community-bound knowledge would deepen analytical scope.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
